svg.text: Reviewer Q&A · 3-phase orchestrated pipeline · agents, their skills, and how they interact
Orchestrator picks the team to invoke

g.text: single fixed coordinator · constructs the team
picks N specialists from 7 pillars per question

svg.text: asyncio.gather: ReportAgent + BaseSpecialist × N (here: 3) · DataPullRequest may be emitted
peer-review the specialists, then Orchestrator synthesizes the FinalAnswer
